default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, reporting, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is catching up on article production and focusing on conversion metrics](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [New reporting dashboard in development, including page views, keywords, and backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Strapi Comp event on May 13th will generate significant content for repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Common Room and Amplitude to be leveraged for tracking user engagement without gating content](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Reporting

  - [GrowthX catching up on article production by next week](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [New reporting dashboard in development:](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Quarterly view: 23,400 page views, 20,000 organic views, 78 referring domains, 244 backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
      - [Weekly, monthly, and quarterly reports to be provided](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
      - [Looker Studio staging for improved visualization](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Integration pages: Template usage clarified, Theo to review and update as needed](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [GA4 and Google Tag Manager updates expected by Friday/Monday](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)

### Content Improvement Requests

  - [Request to add instructions in Airtable for AI workflow (e.g., adding T3 Stack to frameworks list)](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Emphasis on including integration page links in articles](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [GrowthX to compile a list of top 10-30 priority links for internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)

### Analytics and Conversion Tracking

  - [Amplitude data cleaning in progress, expected completion by June 1st](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [HubSpot currently used for lead conversion analysis](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
  - [Discussion on gated vs. ungated content for developer audience](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
  - [Common Room to be used for creating user cohorts based on engagement signals](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)

### Upcoming Initiatives

  - [Strapi Comp on May 13th: Major event with announcements and content generation](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Focus on repurposing and amplifying content from Strapi Comp](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Strategy reset planned upon Victor's return](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Emphasis on bottom-up growth strategy for the year](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to follow up on adding instructions to Airtable for AI workflow](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Compile list of top integration pages for internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
  - [Schedule call with Paul to discuss content repurposing priorities](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [GrowthX to present strategy recommendations in the next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Golzar to share Strapi Comp details as they are finalized](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue catching up on Strapi account and post any questions in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/89DoxR3rVNBFFg6w1hVyRAwEu6DHAUrJ?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)

action_items.description: Stage reporting dashboard in Looker Studio; include weekly, monthly, quarterly reports with engagement rates
Share updated GA4 and Google Tag Manager documentation when received from contractor (expected Fri/Mon)
Follow up with Daniel (CTO) re possibility of adding instructions to Airtable for AI workflow
Add top 10 integration pages to internal linking strategy for content
Schedule call with Paul, Sydney, Jason, Theodore to discuss content repurposing priorities for Strapi Comp
